title: Verify existing Footer component implementation
description: The Footer.tsx component already exists at src/components/Footer.tsx with Footer.module.css and Footer.test.tsx. Implementation includes: 'use client' directive, FooterProps interface with optional copyright prop, responsive CSS with mobile breakpoint at 640px, and basic render tests. Verification confirms the responsive requirement from the issue comment is addressed via CSS media query.
existing_patterns: src/components/Footer.module.css:1 - CSS Module with CSS custom properties (var(--color-background, #f5f5f5)) for theming, media query for responsive breakpoint
